title: How Electricians Make $25K/Month — Business Starter Kit

title: What Do Electricians Charge? 2024 Pricing Guide
description: Panel upgrade: $1,500–$3,500. EV charger install: $500–$1,200. Service call: $75–$150/hr. Here's what electricians actually charge in 2024 — broken down by job type. Pro tip: always add a 15–20% material markup. Get the full pricing templates in the free Electrician Business Starter Kit. Link in bio. #electricianpricing #howtopricejobs #electricianbusiness #contractorpricing
alt: Electrician pricing guide showing rates for panel upgrades, EV chargers, and service calls

title: How to Get Your Electrician License — Step by Step (All 50 States)
